sourcePolicy: private repository audited read-only; public implementation is sanitized and independently tested
safe_to_sync_now: capture, deterministic distill, proposal preview/approve/apply lifecycle
SCAR chunking, BM25 fallback, research radar
private_only_forbidden: identity, relationships, decisions and personal projects
server inventory, cookies, tokens, environment files and private reports
deferred: canonical control database and War Room
private browser and workstation activity scanning
